summary: Iteration 14: Neural background particles, stats strip, cyber-border-hover effects, and enhanced landing page verified. All new features working correctly - animated particle network on hero and CTA sections, stats strip with 50K+/99.9%/7/<60s values, 6 feature cards with cyber-border-hover class, 5 pricing plans, 7 agent cards in architecture section.

Frontend: Stats strip shows '50K+' Apps Built
Frontend: Stats strip shows '99.9%' Uptime SLA
Frontend: Stats strip shows '7' AI Agents
Frontend: Stats strip shows '<60s' Avg. Deploy Time

critical_code_review_comments: NeuralBackground.js correctly implements canvas-based particle animation with mouse interaction
LandingPage.js includes NeuralBackground component in both hero and CTA sections
Stats strip uses aspirational values (50K+, 99.9%, 7, <60s) as specified
Feature cards have cyber-border-hover CSS class for glow effect on hover
All data-testid attributes present for testing (neural-background, feature-card-*, pricing-plan-*, agent-card-*, architecture-graph, deploy-terminal, final-cta-btn)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 verified new landing page features: NeuralBackground component with canvas-based animated particles (appears in hero and CTA sections, 60 nodes with connection lines that brighten on mouse hover), stats strip with social proof numbers (50K+ Apps Built, 99.9% Uptime, 7 AI Agents, <60s Deploy), cyber-border-hover CSS class on feature/compliance cards, architecture graph with 7 agent cards, deploy terminal animation. All 5 pricing plans visible. Login/signup pages have Google SVG icons with cybersecurity theme (deep navy #0a0e1a background).
